ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version

about.description:
TVM FFI is a lightweight foreign function interface library designed for
machine learning systems. It provides efficient cross-language bindings
between Python and C++.
about.summary: TVM FFI - Foreign Function Interface for ML systems

name: apache-tvm-ffi

about.description:
TVM FFI is a lightweight foreign function interface library designed for
machine learning systems. It provides efficient cross-language bindings
between Python and C++.
about.summary: TVM FFI - Foreign Function Interface for ML systems

about.description:
TVM FFI is a lightweight foreign function interface library designed for

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: apache-tvm-ffi
  version: "0.1.9"

package:
  name: ${{ name }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/${{ name[0] }}/${{ name }}/${{ name | replace("-", "_") }}-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: d2d402587e8906de0a07f4746aa78f3d452c7efe3625d4bb39ac2ad693bce530

build:
  number: 0
  skip:
    - win
  script:
    - export SETUPTOOLS_SCM_PRETEND_VERSION=${{ version }}
    - python -m pip install . -vv

requirements:
  build:
    - if: build_platform != host_platform
      then:
        - python
        - cross-python_${{ host_platform }}
        - cython
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
    - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
    - cmake
    - ninja
    - make
  host:
    - python
    - pip
    - scikit-build-core >=0.10.0
    - cython >=3.0
    - setuptools-scm
  run:
    - python
    - typing-extensions >=4.5

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - tvm_ffi
      pip_check: true

about:
  homepage: https://github.com/apache/tvm-ffi
  summary: TVM FFI - Foreign Function Interface for ML systems
  description: |
    TVM FFI is a lightweight foreign function interface library designed for
    machine learning systems. It provides efficient cross-language bindings
    between Python and C++.
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE
  repository: https://github.com/apache/tvm-ffi

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - iamthebot
